findings.title: record_none_reviewer_output_ref can pass even if evidence snapshot capture fails
findings.rationale: The helper always pushes a capture-review-evidence-snapshot step, but only checks success on the final record-reviewer-output step. If capture fails while an older valid snapshot already exists for the bundle, the helper still returns success and qualification can report repaired reviewer-output flow without proving a fresh capture in that path.
findings.suggested_next_action: Fail fast when the capture-review-evidence-snapshot step returns success=false before attempting record-reviewer-output, and add a regression test that forces capture failure to verify the helper surfaces that failure.

findings.title: Delegated-review docs check still depends on exact markdown line wrapping
findings.rationale: The runtime-backend doc check now normalizes whitespace, but the internal-orchestration check still requires the literal substring "not review\njudgment authority". A non-semantic line-wrap change in SKILL.md can flip the delegated_review_authority gate to fail despite unchanged policy text, which undermines gate correctness and stability.
findings.suggested_next_action: Normalize whitespace for review-loop/internal-orchestration content before substring matching (same approach used for runtime-backend text) and add a test case with equivalent wrapped/unwrapped wording.
